description: Compares two values by reference, returns [[true]] if equal.
examples:
<sqf>
_arr1 = [1,[2,[3]]];
_arr2 = _arr1;
_arr1 isEqualTo _arr2;	// true
_arr1 isEqualRef _arr2;	// true

_arr2 = +_arr1;			// array copy
_arr1 isEqualTo _arr2;	// true
_arr1 isEqualRef _arr2;	// false
</sqf>
name: isEqualRef
